tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent $91.87 confirmed (TradingEconomics Apr 17, -2.9%) as Iran FM declares Hormuz 'completely open' and $20B frozen-assets deal enters active negotiation; Islamabad talks Apr 19 confirmed (NBC, CNN). Brent long fully unwound from $102 blockade peak. Trim to low conviction; PTTEP and Medco upside compressed below $65 pre-shock re-entry threshold. Retain Sapura options overlay on tail scenario (25%). Apr 22 ceasefire expiry is the binary catalyst - a signed framework would drive Brent toward $82-85; a talks collapse re-opens $130+ stress. Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Hormuz open declaration (Apr 17) accelerates de-risk: Brent $91.87, ASEAN Energy Equities -3.1% Apr 17; ASEAN Banks +2.0% as risk-off reverses. iTraxx Asia IG tightens to ~175bp (-7bp); ASEAN HY ~545bp (-15bp). Close energy long and neutralize bank underweight as iTraxx approaches 170bp re-add threshold. Tail probability 25%. Apr 22 ceasefire expiry and Apr 19 Islamabad talks are the binary catalyst set - prepare rotation plan in both directions.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short - Close on Hormuz Open Declaration
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP strengthens to ~57.90 (Apr 17 confirmed in cross-asset) as Brent retraces to $91.87 and Iran FM declares Hormuz open; $20B frozen-assets deal reduces tail risk further. Close PHP short position; options 61.00 strike retained only as residual tail hedge at reduced premium given 25% tail probability (ceasefire expiry Apr 22). Philippines bilateral Hormuz routing in place. Re-entry trigger: talks collapse or Apr 22 ceasefire lapse without framework. Conviction flat.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short - Trim Further on De-escalation Signal
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR strengthens to ~16,750 (Apr 17, confirmed in cross-asset, -0.5%) and Indonesia 10Y eases to ~7.14% as Brent drops to $91.87. ICP overshoot narrows to ~$21.87/bbl. Trim short IDR to quarter-size; retain USD Call/IDR Put 17,500 strike option as cheap tail hedge ahead of Apr 22 ceasefire expiry. Stop-loss at USD/IDR 16,400 (Brent sub-$85). Islamabad talks Apr 19 and Apr 22 ceasefire expiry are twin catalysts. Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia ex-Japan IG CDS Protection - Trim Further at 175bp
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG tightens to ~175bp (-7bp Apr 17) and ASEAN HY to ~545bp (-15bp) as Iran FM Hormuz open declaration and $20B deal signal drive risk premium lower. Trim CDS protection from two-thirds to half; retain Sapura / Hyflux paper short on 25% tail probability. Re-add trigger at 190bp (blockade escalation) or Apr 22 ceasefire lapse. Islamabad Apr 19 deal outcome could tighten spreads 15-25bp further, below 165bp re-add threshold.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Scale Back Further on Open Declaration
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM eases to ~$19.15 est. (Apr 17); TTF ~€41.59 est. (-3.7%). Scale back JKM long to quarter-size as Iran FM Hormuz open declaration compresses Asia scarcity premium further. Ras Laffan full restart unlikely before late Aug 2026 (The National) - structural Asia tightness remains. Tail target $24-28 JKM back on table only if Apr 22 ceasefire lapses without framework. Stop at confirmed formal Hormuz reopening with P&I restoration.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

cfTriggers.description: iTraxx Asia IG tightens to ~175bp and ASEAN HY to ~545bp on Iran FM Hormuz open declaration and $20B deal signal (Apr 17). Refinancing window opening further; begin active roadshow preparation and targeted private placements. Execute if spreads tighten below 165bp post Islamabad Apr 19 outcome. Apr 22 ceasefire expiry without deal is the binary downside risk.

Brent retrace to $91.87 and THB strengthening to ~33.30 improve the THB prefunding window: Thailand 10Y eases to ~2.20%. PTTEP upstream EBITDA remains well above pre-shock base. Execute H2 2026 USD prefunding now; Islamabad talks Apr 19 could compress spreads further but Apr 22 ceasefire expiry is a binary risk - do not wait. Gulf JV sanctions-compliance review remains urgent.

Iran FM Hormuz open declaration and $20B deal signal open best execution window since crisis started: iTraxx Asia IG at ~175bp and USD/SGD at ~1.2820. Brent at $91.87 and JKM at ~$19.15 reduce working capital pressure vs blockade peak. Execute revolving-credit expansion before Apr 22 ceasefire expiry; Islamabad Apr 19 deal would tighten spreads further but lapse would re-widen them sharply. Maintain USD hedging.

ASEAN HY tightens to ~545bp on Hormuz open declaration; Brent at $91.87 eases desalination power cost trajectory. Hyflux's utility stress remains structural. Use the spread-tightening window through Apr 22 ceasefire expiry to execute private-credit and quasi-sovereign restructuring; do not treat the open declaration as full resolution. Tail risk 25%.
